reviews.review_description: I would play this game more if it had mixed reality support

I got to the quest to fish. I can not cast my fishing line. I can not delete my saved data to try and reset the game to reset the fishing quest. I can not find help to figure out anything. I am frustrated and just want to continue to play, but I can not. I only have a few buttons, so it should not be this hard! I am at the point where I am just flailing around pushing all of the buttons and getting mad and writing a review because I want to keep playing, but I can't!!!

The fishing is broken so I’m softlocked at 4-3 stage and I can’t do anything aside from walking and waggling the rod aimlessly 


The issue will be fixed in next update (1.3.1)

I would give a full 5 stars if they up the amount of levels to complete the game to keep the fun going! When I complete all of  the challenges I will go back to get 3 stars on all levels. PLEASE INCREASE THE AMOUNT OF LEVELS before I get there! Also, up the graphics too! The box like figures makes it to childlike! In updates, levels of difficulty will make it more challenging too!

With the verbal cues and lack of challenges in the shooting portion of the game, I felt like I was playing a game for a elementary student.

Pros:
- Cheap though cute graphics
- Great for the younger Oculus users

Cons:
- Verbal cues were very regular and repetitive, making me feel like I was a child being encouraged by a teacher.
- No difficult challenges or limits when playing the shooting portion of the game. Just shoot blocks next to matching colors until you collect what you need.
- Huge lag in teleporting.

Unless I missed something or there is an update happening soon, this game is worth less than $10.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your feedback!

We really appreciate them and we will use them as a reference to improve the game even further.

We are currently working on an update and planning to do them periodically. 
This includes adding more new game modes along with new puzzle stages. 

Stay tune for more update and thank you for playing the game!

reviews.review_description: This is a perfect game for people that don’t want an action packed game but rather a relaxing and overall fun game!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review!
We are truly glad that you liked the theme and world-view of the game!

We are currently working on an update and planning to do them periodically. This includes adding more new game modes along with new puzzle stages. 

Stay tune for more update and thank you for enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: I completed the first stage (monkeys) with maximum stars on all levels and when I try to select the second stage on the map, nothing happens. I click on the second stage but all the slots are greyed out and unclickable! I waited too long too try this out and now can’t return. How can I access the next phase of the game? The map is completely unresponsive to clicks except going back to stage 1 monkeys which already has max stars in every level. The game said go to the map and and the next stage, but nothing happens when I click on it. Only the monkey stage is playable. Impossible to progress!

reviews.review_title: Surprisingly fun and cute to play!
reviews.review_description:
I was surprised how much fun I'm having playing this game!
Developers should add a funfair next to the zoo and task you with building rollercoasters and racing tracks lol!😃👍
Five stars from me🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

I’m waiting for new levels more stars with more levels x

Very fun game. Puzzles and cute animals. What's not to love?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review!
We are truly glad that you liked the theme and world-view of the game!

We are continuing to improve the game so that everyone can enjoy the game even more!

Stay tune for more update and thank you for playing the game!

reviews.review_description: Really fun game to play

With bright graphics, upbeat music and cute tasks, this game brings the match-3 concept into VR.

The puzzle levels increase in difficulty as you progress, and I've got to be honest, the narrator's voice grew on me. 

I'm looking forward to more levels and updates. For anyone looking for a happy, stress-free escape, this is a great game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the appreciative comments!

We also glad to hear that you liked the Narrator's voice!

The puzzle difficulties increases as you proceed through the game, however if you keep retrying, we are sure that you will be able to continue and proceed rebuilding your zoo!

We are currently working on an update and planning to do them periodically. 
This includes adding more new game modes along with new puzzle stages, so stay tune for any updates!

reviews.review_description: GAME DOES NOT WORK AND I WANT MY MONEY BACK.

I really had high hopes with all the positive reviews. Unfortunately I felt the story was too boring. I wish you could bypass listening to the people talk and just do the puzzles. The puzzles themselves were fun, albeit easy since I only made it through the first 8 or so.

I love match games and this one is great.
The repetitive voices do get a bit annoying and the music too, easy fix if you could turn  at least the music off in the settings.
While the graphics and script seemed to be aimed  at a very young audience, the puzzles can be a bit harder, maybe you could make  this game a little more grown up, I’m 60 and I feel like I should be 7  playing this game. Considering that most Quest players would be more on the grown up side, making it a bit more adult might help your sales. I am enjoying it a lot and look forward to improvements. 
I hope you will take these ideas on board.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review!
We are truly glad that you liked the game!

Your feedback is well received and we are considering to have some improvement of the game such as adjusting the level design of the puzzle, so that all players can have an enjoyable experience throughout the game!

We are currently working on an update and planning to do them periodically. 
This includes adding more new game modes along with new puzzle stages. stay tune for more updates!

Thank you again for your continuous support

reviews.review_description: Great fun but how do i reset to let different grandchildren play there own part

This is my first review! This game is so much fun and helped me to destress. I loved all of the bright colors, the animals and the missions I was sent on. The matching/shooting levels were challenging and lots of fun. I wish this game had at least 100 levels. I was so sad when I finished the game within a 2 week period and anxiously awaiting an update. This is my favorite game on Oculus! Please make more like this and update this game with plenty of levels to keep me busy.
Great game, match 2 or more puzzle game lots of explosions. Fun for all ages!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for liking the Puzzle!

ZOOKEEPER: Blast Quest is a match game that aims to be exhilarating, and we will continue to improve the game with updates so that player of all ages can enjoy the game!
